issues.summary: R1 fresh canonical coverage matrix: rewrote audit-question-bank-v2-coverage.ts to a deterministic per-EXAM_SPECS matrix (45 rows; SAT reading split into 4 official domains) with full fields (required input mode, audio/rubric flags, draft/reviewed/active/rejected/retired, items, stimuli, activeAudio, rubricItems, sourceStages) and a 5-state machine MISSING/THIN/READY_DRAFT/READY_ACTIVE/BLOCKED + blockingReasons[]. Added scripts/validate-coverage-audit.ts (fixtures: zero-row=>MISSING; SAT per-domain not combined; listening draft+no-active-audio=>BLOCKED; +structure) and npm validate:coverage-audit. READY_DRAFT threshold = 50; audio cells cannot be READY_ACTIVE without active audio.

THIN=zhongkao grammar_fill 48, cet6 banked_cloze 34. issues.summary: R2 source↔DB audit (new read-only scripts/verify-source-db-all-authored.ts; permutation-invariant for answer-position-normalized choice items): 1314 authored source records, 1154 match DB 1:1. Bounded source↔DB DRIFT in 3 productive stages — prod-ky-aw(50), prod-ky-essay(50), prod-zk-aw(50): disk source edited after import (prompts still match live DB items exactly, but sourceText drifted → deterministic legacy hash no longer matches). 150 disk records ↔ 150 DB draft sets: same content, mutually unlinked. Plus 10 early-stage records (g3 6, g4 2, gapfill 2) fail shapeToItems passage_too_short — correctly never imported (superseded historical drafts on disk).

DB internally valid (qa:qsets-v2/validate:qbank-v2 pass).

See reports/qbank-content-repair-log.md.

issues.summary: R4 官方格式核验（纯研究，无 DB/UI/模板改动）。依据 ETS iBT 2026 官方 Blueprint/Specifications（本地 .firecrawl/toefl-spec-2026.md）+ 各考试官方 sourceUrls。结论：read_daily_life 与 academic_reading(reading_comprehension·toefl) 维持 official_spec_unverified/BLOCKED——官方仅称 selected-response(e.g. multiple choice)、未给 MCQ 选项数；academic 每篇题数亦未给（仅 5-15/claim）。build_a_sentence 维持 scoring_not_ready（R3 解决）。新确认音频/口语官方规格供 R6/R7：听力 played once(不重听)、子类题量范围(Choose-a-Response 15-19 / Conversation 10 / Announcement 6-10 / Academic Talk 8-16；总 47)、Speaking(Listen-and-Repeat 7 / Interview 4)、音频长度(≤6 重音音节→≤250 词,中段 35-100)、口音 US/CA/AU/UK(AI+真人)。EXAM_SPECS 各段题量(R50/L47/W12/S11)与官方一致，无需改动。
issues.evidence: reports/exam-spec-revalidation-2026-06-23.md（confirmed/ranged/unverified 分列）。validate:exam-specs EXIT 0(7 exams)、validate:question-types EXIT 0(taxonomy ok)、qa:qsets-v2 EXIT 0、lint 0、tsc 0。R1 覆盖矩阵已将两 reading 型显示为 BLOCKED(official_spec_unverified)。

issues.summary: R9 事务化晋级 RPC（交付，未应用，停在 apply 闸口）。新增 supabase/sql/p5-question-bank-promotion-rpc.sql：函数 promote_question_sets_v2(p_set_ids uuid[])——仅接受显式 set UUID 数组（不按 type/level 谓词批量）；FOR UPDATE 锁定；逐 set 校验（draft；非退役 antonym_choice/cet_cloze；非 scoring_not_ready/official_spec_unverified；≥1 item 且全 draft 且 answer 非空；生产性 free_text/speak 必有 rubric_id；听力 listening_comprehension 或 item.input_mode=listen 必有 active 音频；stimulus FK 存在）；通过者同一事务内 items→active+set→active；任何意外 DB 错误整体回滚（不可能出现部分 active）；返回每 id {result,reason}（promoted/already_active/rejected）；对已 active 幂等。EXECUTE 仅 service_role（PUBLIC revoke）。改 scripts/promote-question-sets-v2.ts：--apply 改为调用该 RPC（dry-run 不变）。新增 scripts/validate-promotion-rpc.ts（--expect-not-applied 预检 + 默认对无效候选 scoring_not_ready 测拒绝且零状态变更）。
issues.evidence: validate-promotion-rpc --expect-not-applied EXIT 0（RPC 尚未应用,符合预期）;promote dry-run(cet4 en_to_zh limit1) EXIT 0(candidates1/eligible1,未调 RPC);validate:qbank-v2(active0)/lint/tsc EXIT 0。SQL 未自动应用——等用户在 Supabase 应用后再跑 validate-promotion-rpc(默认)验证。无 promote、无 active、无 DB 写。
issues.containment: 仅交付 SQL+校验器+改 promote 脚本;未应用 SQL、未晋级、active 仍 0。apply 闸口:用户应用 p5-question-bank-promotion-rpc.sql → 跑 validate-promotion-rpc.ts(默认) → R10 才实际晋级。 APPLIED+VALIDATED: 用户已在 Supabase 应用 p5-question-bank-promotion-rpc.sql；validate-promotion-rpc.ts(默认) PASS——无效候选(build_a_sentence/scoring_not_ready) 被拒且零状态变更,无晋级;snapshot active 仍 0。R10 可用该 RPC 做原子小批晋级(需逐项授权)。

issues.summary: 安全发现（R3 设计输入）：当前练习会话载荷 PracticeItem.answer（lib/practice/session-builder 下发 answer:row.answer）把答案键下发到客户端 pre-submit。R3 契约要求 active/考试内容的答案键不得出现在提交前客户端载荷。注：transcript 已受保护（session-builder 注明练习载荷绝不下发 transcript，提交后由 audio-asset-client review 拉取）——仅 answer 字段是泄露点。
issues.containment: 属架构/设计决策（单词练习即时客户端反馈 vs 考试服务端权威无泄露），随 R3 设计稿一并定夺;未改动。R10 转 active 前必须解决考试型内容的此项。
